_meta.description: PAX trees for the devastator. Two branches; each path shares a universal trunk.

nodes.name: Hunting Season
nodes.desc: Increase your Weapon Damage by 30% and your magazine size by 50%.

nodes.name: Harvester
nodes.desc: Increase your Weapon Leech by 10%. Additionally increase Weapon Leech by 2% for every enemy in Close Range up to 10%.

nodes.name: Hardened
nodes.desc: Increase your Damage Mitigation by 5%. Additionally increase Damage Mitigation by 2% for every enemy in Close Range up to 10%.

nodes.name: Finishing Touch
nodes.desc: Increase your Weapon Damage by the percentage of ammo missing from your magazine. Killing shots replenish 35% of your magazine.

nodes.name: Armored Division
nodes.desc: Increase your Armor Piercing by 20%. Reduce your KINETIC skills Cooldown by 50% of your Armor Piercing value.

nodes.name: Against Devastating Odds
nodes.desc: Damaging at least 3 enemies with a KINETIC skill grants you 30% Armor Piercing for 4 seconds. Damaging less enemies makes your shots Critical Shots for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Come One, Come All
nodes.desc: Your KINETIC skills remove Effect Resistance from hit Elites. 7 seconds cooldown.

nodes.name: Elitism
nodes.desc: Shots on Elites reduce incoming damage from Elites by 15% and increase damage against Elites by 30% for 5 seconds. 5 seconds cooldown.

nodes.name: Strange Surgeon
nodes.desc: Your shots inflict Bleed. Killing an enemy afflicted with Bleed in Close Range reduces ongoing Cooldown of PROTECTION skills by 1.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Force
nodes.desc: While a PROTECTION skill is active, you release seismic impulses every 2 seconds that deal damage equal to 40% of your Armor.

nodes.name: Impact Point
nodes.desc: Your SEISMIC and KINETIC skill damage is increased by an additional 30% of your Anomaly Power. Bonus damage is split among all damaged enemies.

nodes.name: Puncture
nodes.desc: Your SEISMIC skill inflicts Bleed. Anomaly Damage to enemies afflicted with Bleed is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Obliteration
nodes.desc: Increase your Anomaly power and Resistance Piercing by 6%. Each damaged enemy increases the bonus by 3%, up to additional 9% for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Earthen Shell
nodes.desc: Damage Dealt with skills is converted to Shield

nodes.name: Upheaval
nodes.desc: Enemies damaged by SEISMIC skill become Upheaved for 2 seconds , storing 10% of damage received during the time and releasing it once the effect ends.

nodes.name: Multistrike
nodes.desc: 30% of damage dealt by SEISMIC skill is stored and added to your next SEISMIC skill. The effect resets every time you release your stored damage.

nodes.name: Richter Rising
nodes.desc: Enemies damaged by both SEISMIC and KINETIC skills within 4 seconds, receive 15% more damage for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Energy Transmission
nodes.desc: Each enemy damaged by your KINETIC skill increases the damage of your next SEISMIC skill by 15%.

nodes.name: Terms of Engagement
nodes.desc: 60% of damage dealt by KINETIC skill is stored and added to your next KINETIC skill. The effect resets every time you release your stored damage.

nodes.name: Momentum
nodes.desc: Each enemy damaged by your KINETIC skill reduces the ongoing cooldowns of other  KINETIC skills by 1 second, up to 4 seconds.
